examples.title: Algorithm: Building Component Hierarchy
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Swing component hierarchy
examples.code:
BEGIN
 CREATE JFrame (top-level container)
 CREATE JPanel (intermediate container)
 ADD JPanel to JFrame's content pane
 CREATE JButton, JLabel, JTextField (components)
 ADD components to JPanel
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step process of building a Swing component hierarchy

examples.title: Java: Building Component Hierarchy
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Swing component hierarchy in Java
examples.explanation: Java implementation of building a Swing component hierarchy
